title: Bramblewire Systems Closes $9M Seed Round
summary: A seed round for infrastructure-monitoring startup Bramblewire Systems, reported by a general tech-news outlet.

title: Cobalt Current's New API Gateway Gets Coverage From a Developer Newsletter
summary: A developer-focused newsletter covers Cobalt Current's newly launched API gateway.

title: Confusion Grows Around Similarly Named Workflow Startups Including Loomwright
summary: A roundup piece lumps several similarly-branded workflow-automation startups together, mentioning Loomwright only in passing.

title: Mosskettle Raises Fresh Funding to Expand Bookkeeping Automation
summary: Bookkeeping-automation startup Mosskettle announced a new funding round.

title: Tanglecove Launches New Analytics Suite
summary: Analytics startup Tanglecove announced a new self-serve reporting suite.

title: Galehollow Systems Expands Into European Market
summary: Galehollow Systems announced its first European office as part of an international expansion.
